text: Whom do you consider to be a [maftyF, among you? They (the Companions) ‘said: Messenger, of Allah, one who is slain in the way of Allah is a maryr He said: Then (f this is the defintion of a [martyr) the martyrs. of my Umma. will be small in number. They asked: Messenger of Allsh, who are they? He. ‘said: One who is slain in the way of Allah is a [mayF; one who dies in the. ‘way of Allah, is a [maftyF; one who dies of plague is a matyF; one who dies. of cholera is a [maryr. Ibn Migsam said: | testiy the ruth of your father's. ‘statement (with regard to this tradition) that the Holy Prophet (may peace be. ‘upon him) said: One who is drowned is a martyr. PP + Sahih Muslim 19153
